title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: BENTON HEALTH CENTER OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. This clinic also offers vasectomy procedures. 530 NW 27th Street Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Individuals with a income below 250% federal poverty level Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 766-6835 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 766-6835 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: The Community Health Center is located in the Benton County Health Services building. Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sterilization * Men Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRIMARY HEALTH CARE SERVICES SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BENTON HEALTH CENTER
